query: When does the new season of law and order special victims unit start?

documents.text: <onlyinclude> </onlyinclude> "Unstoppable", written by Julie Martin and Rick Eid, inspired by the sexual misconduct allegations against then-presidential candidate Donald Trump and starring Gary Cole, was originally scheduled to air on October 26, 2016, but it was pulled from the schedule and has since been shelved. At the 2017 Television Critics Association winter press tour, Dick Wolf expressed his belief that the episode may air that spring. NBC currently has no plans to air the episode, therefore shelving it indefinitely. It was announced on May 25, 2017 that original "Law & Order" and "Law & Order: Criminal Intent" showrunner Michael S. Chernuchin would be reprising his role starting on season nineteen. Chernuchin was also co-creator and executive producing showrunner of "Chicago Justice", another Wolf-related show that was canceled by NBC at the end of the 2016ΓÇô17 TV season. Law & Order: Special Victims Unit (season 17) The seventeenth season of "" debuted on Wednesday, September 23, 2015 on NBC, and concluded on Wednesday, May 25, 2016. "Law & Order: Special Victims Unit" was renewed for a seventeenth season on February 5, 2015, by NBC. Mariska Hargitay (Olivia Benson) had her contract renewed for season 17, as well as Ice-T (Det. Fin Tutuola). baseline.final_answer: The eighteenth season of Law & Order: Special Victims Unit debuted on September 21, 2016. The nineteenth season premiered on September 27, 2017.

evaluation.feedback: The answer contains factual claims about the premiere dates of seasons 18 and 19, but no citations were provided to support these claims. Therefore, the answer is not grounded in the provided documents.
